reasoning: The control SC-7(12) focuses on boundary protection, which in Kubernetes can be mapped to network security and pod security configurations. NetworkPolicies can be used to enforce ingress and egress restrictions, ensuring that pods cannot communicate with unauthorized external networks. Disabling host networking for pods and avoiding NodePort services further restricts unnecessary exposure of the cluster to external networks.
